mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status = 'WAIT_PAY' AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status = 'WAIT_RECEIVE' AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM aftersale_info a JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = a.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.aftersale_status IN ('WAIT_AUDIT','WAIT_RETURN','WAIT_RECEIVE','WAIT_REFUND') AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT pa.current_points FROM point_account pa JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = pa.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1 ), 0)

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.merchant_id = ( SELECT merchant.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.merchant_id = ( SELECT merchant.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status = 'PENDING_AUDIT' AND o.merchant_id = ( SELECT merchant.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status = 'WAIT_SHIP' AND o.merchant_id = ( SELECT merchant.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_spu spu WHERE spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = ( SELECT ma.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_sku sku JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE sku.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = ( SELECT ma.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_sku sku JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE sku.deleted = 0 AND sku.stock_qty <= sku.safety_stock AND spu.supplier_id = ( SELECT ma.id FROM member_account ma JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = ma.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )
